name: The Banished Sage Learns the World
translation-context:
Title: 追放の賢者、世界を知る ～幼馴染勇者の圧力から逃げて自由になった俺～. Translate as: The Banished Sage Learns the World: I Escaped the Pressure of My Childhood Friend the Hero and Became Free.

Premise: Haru is a mage/sage who was in the party of his childhood friend Leticia, the Hero. Leticia is verbally abusive and repeatedly uses power harassment against Haru. Worn down mentally and physically, Haru deliberately provokes his own banishment, leaves Leticia, and becomes free. After leaving her, things start going well for him, while Leticia gradually deteriorates. The story contrasts these two childhood friends after their separation.

Name guidance: ハル = Haru. レティシア = Leticia. アリス = Alice. シルファ = Sylpha. アーランド = Arland. ミリエラ・ユルスクール = Miriera Yurschool.

Tone/style: fantasy adventure with party banishment, hero/sage dynamics, emotional abuse recovery, and a mix of serious conflict and light novel dialogue. Keep character names consistent. Translate 勇者 as Hero, 賢者 as Sage, 魔法使い as mage/magician depending on sentence flow, and パワハラ as power harassment or workplace-style abuse depending on context.
